_comment: Opt-in list of accounts AI Manager considers replying under (see src/triggers/ai_manager.py) -- the one deliberate exception to the 'never auto-reply under other accounts' rule. 'user_id' is optional: leave it blank and it auto-resolves from 'handle' on first use (one read call, then cached), or paste the numeric ID yourself to skip that lookup. An entry with enabled=false does nothing at all. 'times_per_day' is a hard per-account cap -- the global thresholds in config/ai_manager.json (max_replies_per_day) is the real ceiling across all accounts combined.
